original_statement: what is the only years that total losses were below 350,000?
mutated_statement: what is the only years that some totals were below some amount?
mutation_analysis: [Metric generalization + Numeric generalization]: Specific metric "total losses" generalized to vague "some totals" | Exact value "350,000" replaced by vague "some amount" (total losses → some totals | 350,000 → some amount)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和iteration中的thought可见，agent直接列出“total”行的年度总数并断定“只有1940/41和1944/45低于400,000”（judge_thought明确记录了各年数值和结论）。日志中既未使用ambiguous、unclear等词，也未要求澄清模糊表述（如“some totals”或“some amount”），而是按自己的理解直接处理并给出具体答案。因此agent未识别出问题的模糊性，表现为将模糊问题当作明确问题来解答，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
